message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock for transitively bumped deps

Lockfile-only update reflecting upstream version churn in
transitively-pinned dependencies. Notable bumps:

- foldhash 0.1.5 → 0.2.0 (used by fsqlite-* crates)
- lru bumped to 0.16.4
- new dep `smallvec` pulled into fsqlite-storage's transitive set
- new dep `itoa` pulled into fsqlite-core's transitive set

No `Cargo.toml` edits in this repo — all changes are downstream of
asupersync / fsqlite-* upstream version moves that already shipped.
Re-running `cargo update -w` deterministically produces this lock
state from the current manifest, so committing keeps the workspace's
lockfile in sync with what `cargo build` will use on a fresh clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
